titleStmt.title: SII 22.372: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 372. (A.R. No. 372 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. MĒLAIKKŌYIL ROCK-CUT TEMPLE—ON THE SECOND GŌPUṚA. RIGHT AT ENTRANCE. TRIBH. VĪRAPĀṆḌYADĒVA—2nd YEAR

summary.p: This is an interesting document. It states that the temple treasury of Tirunalakkuṉṟam Uḍaiya-nāyanār had been burgled by priests who stole away the jewels and cash therefrom. The theft was found out and a meeting was called of all the (representative) inhabitants of the nāḍu, nagaram and grāmam of the region, who held an enquiry into the offair. one of the priests by name Kuṉṟan Serundivanapperumāṉ confessed to have taken 60 poṉ and shared it with a stone mason. He also implicated the others in the theft but they denied all knowledge of the matter. They were thereupon taken to a court at Mattukurichchi (?) presied over by a Sāmanta and ordered to prove their innocence before the assembled people by holding a red-hot iron in their hands. The ordeal went against them as their hands were burnt and they had to confess their guilt. The culprits were all pronounced as Śiva drōhis and they were deprived of their holdings at Iluppaik-kuḍi, which were now transferred to the temple as Tirunāmattukkāṇi with the cultivating right thereon (kōyiluḻavu-muṟṟūṭṭu.) Such lands as had been sold by them to others were got back on payment of their cost by the temple and those held on mortgage were recovered without any compensation. Other private lands in the village were to continue their payment of the achchuvari and other taxes into the temple as usual.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuṉavaccakravarttikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2Āvatu koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu nāṭukaḷ nakaraṅkaḷ grāmaṅkaḷom Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ kāṅkeyarāyaṉ tirumaṇ
ṭapattu niṟaivaṟaniṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Eṅkaḷil Amainta piṭipāṭu Iṭṭapaṭiyāka Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiyanāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭāram tiruvāparaṇa mūlapaṇṭārattai Ikkoyiṟ civappirāmaṇarkaḷ kaḷavile Eṭuttukkoḷa Itu nāṭāka kūṭi Iruntu Iccivappirāma
ṇarai Aḻaittu kaḷaviṟoyeṉneṉṟu keṭṭaviṭattuk kuṉṟaṉ ceruntivaṉap perumāṉāṉa Etirilicoḻapaṭṭaṉ coṉṉapaṭi pokkaṟa taccaṉum tāṉumāka Aṟupatu poṉ Eṭuttuk kūṟiṭṭukkoṇṭu taḷḷiṉavai maṟṟuḷḷa civappirāmaṇarai
Aḻaittuk keṭṭaviṭattu nāṅkaḷ Ivai Oṉṟum Aṟintilom Eṉṟārkaḷ Eṉṟapiṉ kuṉṟaṉ cerutti nāṉ Eṭutta Aṟupatu poṉṉum Oḻiya nikkiyuḷḷa poṉ Ivarkaḷ Eṭuttukkoṇṭārkaḷeṉṟu collukaiyil
Aṅṅaṉaiyākil Eṅkaḷ periya Ūr mattukuṟicciyile cāmantaṉār tirumuṉpe taṉmājaṉattu paṭṭarkaḷ pakkale keṭṭu Aṅku vitittapaṭi [ sat] tiyam paṇṇuṅkoḷ Eṉṟu viṭṭom Ipper Uṭaiyār tiruakatticuvaramuṭaiyār tirukko
yilile cāmantaṉukku muṉpāka Aḻavum tiruppāmālai tirukkūṭṭattu Iṟaṅkal miṭṭārum vayirākikaḷu muṉṉilaiyākavum koḻuvuruviṉaviṭattu kuṉṟaṉ paṅkaṉum kuṉṟamāṟaṉ puṟṟiṭaṅ koṇṭāṉum periyāraṉ tevaṉum kuṉṟaṉ pirampai caṅkūtiyum Āka Ivarkaḷ kaivekaiyil kuṉṟaṉ ca
ṅkūti nāṉum Eṭutteṉ paṅkaṉum Eṭuttāṉ Ivai Aṟiveṉ Eṉṟapaṭiyāle cerunti cattiyam ceyyaveṇṭakkillai Ippaṭi meṟku koyiṟ civappiramaṇaril kaḷḷarāṉavarkaḷai māṟkattutattukkuk kaṭavār civatturokikaḷaic ceyyumuṟaimaikaḷilec ceyyavu nilaiyiṭṭu maṟṟuḷḷa civa
ppirāmaṇarukkuṅ kāvaṟcorvukku Allātavarākaiyāl Ivarkaḷ paṟṟiṉa Iluppaikkuṭikkuḷḷa ṉāṉ kellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa melnokkiṉa maramuṅkīḻ nokkiṉa kiṉaṟu maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭavaṉum Innāyanār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāyk koyiluḻavu mu
ṟṟūṭṭākat tiru mum paṇṇikkuṭuttu Inta Iluppaikkuṭi civappirāmaṇar pakkal vilaikoṇṭavarkaḷ taṅkaḷ piṭippāṭṭāl Uḷḷa poruḷ paṇṭārattepaṟṟi nilam miṭak kaṭavārkaḷ Eṉṟum Oṟṟikkoṇṭār Oṟṟi Iḻakkap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Innilattā
l vanta Antarāyam taraviṉiokam Accuvari Āṭtevai cilvari peruvari ḷeṉṟu collak kaṭavatallavākavum Ivvūril civappirāmaṇar kaiykaḷāl vilai Iṉṟit taṉkāṇiyāṉa nilaṅkaḷukku Accuvari Āṭtevai maṟṟum Ūrintavari viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭi nāyaṉāṟke Iruppārkaḷāka
vum Iṭṭu Inilam Ināyaṉāṟkku cantirātittiyaval cellak kaṭavatākavum Itukku Oru vilaṅkal coṉṉār Uṇṭākil nāṭṭukku piḻaittār paṭṭatum paṭṭuc civatturokikaḷ paṭṭatum paṭṭu Aṉṟāḻ komaṟṟamaṟkut teṇṭamum Iṟupparākavum Ippaṭic cammatittu
cantirātittapakal cellakkaṭavatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttom Ātitaṇṭecuvaratevaṟku koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavaḷa nāṭṭu Iraṇṭukaraināṭṭu nāṭukaḷ nakaraṅkaḷ kirāmaṅkaḷomum Ikkoyiṟt tānat
tomum . Ippaṭikkup paṉaṅkuṭik kuṉṟantevanāṉa teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku paramparaiyūr nampucevāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cikaranallūr vaḷavataraiyaṉ Ippaṭikku kāraiyūṟ ceṅkatiṟ coḻamuventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
neruñcikkuṭi virarācentira coḻamuventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . kīḻt taṇiyattu viracoḻatoḻaveḷār Eḻuttu . vicalūṟ kulatipaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . Aṇṇalvāyil vaḷḷuvaṉ pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . putuvūrp periyatevaṉ Eḻuttu . cuntaracoḻapurattu
t teṉkoṉāṭṭu veḷaāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kīḻmaṇalūr Irācentiraveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . vempaṉūr Īcāṉatevaṉ Eḻuttu . menelvelip poṟkāri cūriyatevaṉ Eḻuttu . tirunalakkuṉṟattu Aṉpāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu . nampi Eḻuttu
kulottuṅkap pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai kiñcattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai Āḷavantānokkaṉāṉa Aṟputakkūttapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai Āḷavantān tiruvottacāmamaḻakiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Itu perumāḷ Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku vaṭukaṉ piḷḷāṉāṉa Ālālacuntarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai koyiṟkaṇakku periyanāṭṭuppiriyaṉ Eḻuttu . kuṭukantiyāka veḷāṉ Eḻuttu . nāṭṭārum tānattārum Aruḷicceya Ippiṭipāṭu Eḻutinen Ikkoyiṟkaṇakkuk kuṉṟan tirunalakkuṉṟa
muṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
